regions.text: Here are two trains. The man was in this train. He is going to the other train. He is making a change. He is changing trains.
The potatoes were hard. After a time they were soft. There was a change in the potatoes.
This water was cold. Now it is boiling. That is a change. There was a change in the water.
In the summer the leaves are on the trees. in the fall the leaves come down off the trees. That is a change.
